description_long: This is a stone obelisk monument set on a multi-tiered rectangular base, surrounded by a patch of grass and low vegetation. The obelisk is constructed from large, light gray stone blocks, with a prominent stepped plinth supporting the main shaft. The shaft rises vertically and is topped with a small, square capital and a distinctive star-shaped finial. The front face of the obelisk features a recessed rectangular panel, possibly intended for an inscription or plaque, though no clear text is visible. The structure appears weathered, with some discoloration and moss growth at the base, suggesting it has been exposed to the elements for some time.
description: A light gray stone obelisk with a stepped base, topped by a star-shaped finial, set amidst grass and low vegetation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered stone base and the vertical shaft, with the star finial visible at the top.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the solid stone construction and the symmetrical, blocky design of the base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the stone block pattern and the grassy surroundings.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the recessed rectangular panel on the obelisk's shaft and the stepped base, with vegetation around the monument.
attribute_ornamentation: A star-shaped finial at the tip serves as the only visible ornamentation.
attribute_base_design: The base consists of multiple rectangular stone steps, each slightly smaller than the one below, forming a tiered plinth. The lowest tier is broad and square, supporting two narrower upper steps, all made from the same light gray stone. Some moss and grass are growing at the base edges.
attribute_tip_design: The tip features a small, square capital topped with a prominent star-shaped finial, both made of stone and matching the rest of the monument in color and texture.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is surrounded by a patch of grass and low vegetation, with no visible fences, statues, or paving.
